title: Pet Munchies Chicken and Calcium Bones Dog Treats, Premium Dog Chews with Natural Real Meat, Low in Fat and High in Protein 100g (Pack of 8)
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL CHICKEN: This gourmet treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade, chicken breast meat wrapped around a calcium bone - delicately slow roasted to perfection in their own natural juices
HEALTHY, NUTRITIONAL & JUNK-FREE: Our chicken and calcium bones contain no artificial colours or flavours, are naturally high in protein and low in fat & salt
GREAT FOR TEETH DEVELOPMENT & HEALTHY BONES: Calcium is good for teeth development and healthy bones, making these the ultimate treat for growing dogs

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our chicken and calcium bones are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
description: Product Description Delicately roasted to perfection in their own natural juices ensures the highest quality and exceptional palatability that dogs love. Indications all breeds, sizes, and ages over 4 months, teeth development, and healthy bones Ingredients See ingredients on packaging Directions Re-seal pack after use. Box Contains Each order comes with 8 x Pet Munchies 100g Dog Treat Pouches See more
